# `quishing` — quishing templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 6

QR code phishing (quishing) templates. These bypass email security filters by encoding malicious URLs in QR code images.

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MFA Re-enrollment QR Code | [`qr_code_mfa.html`](qr_code_mfa.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 30-50% |
| New Office WiFi QR Code | [`qr_code_wifi.html`](qr_code_wifi.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 40-60% |
| Microsoft MFA QR Code Update | [`microsoft_mfa_qr.html`](microsoft_mfa_qr.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |
| Municipal Unpaid Toll QR Citation | [`parking_toll_qr.html`](parking_toll_qr.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 45-65% |
| Scan to View Encrypted Document QR | [`secure_document_qr.html`](secure_document_qr.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-50% |
| DocuSign Signature Request QR | [`docusign_qr.html`](docusign_qr.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |

## Template details

### MFA Re-enrollment QR Code

- **File:** [`qr_code_mfa.html`](qr_code_mfa.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/quishing_education.html`](education/quishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action Required: Re-enroll in Multi-Factor Authentication
  - IT Security: MFA registration expires — action required today
  - Mandatory: Update your authenticator app by end of business
- **Operator notes:** Extremely effective against non-technical users. MFA re-enrollment is a plausible IT request that employees can't easily verify. Include a manual link fallback for GoPhish tracking.

### New Office WiFi QR Code

- **File:** [`qr_code_wifi.html`](qr_code_wifi.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/quishing_education.html`](education/quishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - IT: Connect to new office WiFi using the QR code below
  - Facilities & IT: Office network upgrade — connect by Friday
  - New secure WiFi network — employee action required
- **Operator notes:** WiFi upgrade is a very believable IT scenario. Works well for office return campaigns or after physical office changes. The manual download link is the primary GoPhish tracking vector.

### Microsoft MFA QR Code Update

- **File:** [`microsoft_mfa_qr.html`](microsoft_mfa_qr.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/quishing_education.html`](education/quishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action Required: Set up Microsoft Authenticator App (MFA)
  - Microsoft 365 Security: Mandatory MFA Device Registration Update
  - IT Notice: QR verification required to prevent account lockout
- **Operator notes:** Simulates Microsoft 365 security updates prompting users to scan a QR code to configure the Microsoft Authenticator app.

### Municipal Unpaid Toll QR Citation

- **File:** [`parking_toll_qr.html`](parking_toll_qr.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/quishing_education.html`](education/quishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Notice of Violation: Unpaid road toll invoice
  - Tolls Bureau: Final warning before court penalty fees
  - Action Required: Scan QR to settle outstanding vehicle citation
- **Operator notes:** Uses anxiety around outstanding legal/traffic citations and low monetary amounts to bypass standard user skepticism.

### Scan to View Encrypted Document QR

- **File:** [`secure_document_qr.html`](secure_document_qr.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/quishing_education.html`](education/quishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Secure Document Shared: Scan QR code to view performance review
  - Confidential: Encrypted PDF shared in secure workspace
  - Verification needed: View shared organizational adjustments file
- **Operator notes:** Exploits professional curiosity by claiming an encrypted salary or performance PDF is waiting, but requires scanning a verification QR code.

### DocuSign Signature Request QR

- **File:** [`docusign_qr.html`](docusign_qr.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/quishing_education.html`](education/quishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - DocuSign: Signature required for Mutual NDA and Agreement
  - Review Document: Please sign pending envelope in DocuSign
  - Action Required: Scan DocuSign secure access code to execute
- **Operator notes:** Impersonates standard corporate e-signature notification, redirecting the mobile signing workflow via QR.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
